elements.sent-2411-001: We describe an algorithm to compute the stable multiplicity of a family of irreducible representations in the cohomology of ordered configuration space of the plane.
elements.sent-2411-002: Using this algorithm, we compute the stable multiplicities of all families of irreducibles given by Young diagrams with $23$ boxes or less up to cohomological degree $50$.
elements.sent-2411-003: In particular, this determines the stable cohomology in cohomological degrees $0 \leq i \leq 11$.
elements.sent-2411-004: We prove related qualitative results and formulate some conjectures.
elements.sent-2411-005: The $n$th ordered configuration space of the plane is the space of $n$-tuples in $\C^n$ with distinct coordinates, denoted $\pconf_n(\C)$. \begin{equation}\pconf_n(\C) := \{(x_1, \dots, x_n) \in \C^n \ | \ x_i \neq x_j  when $i \neq j$\}\end{equation} There is a natural action of the symmetric group of $n$ elements (denoted here by $S_n$) on $\pconf_n(\C)$ by permuting the coordinates.
elements.sent-2411-006: This induces an action of $S_n$ on cohomology so $H^i(\pconf_n(\C);\C)$ is an $S_n$-representation.

elements.algorithm-2411-002: \caption{YoungToCharPoly ($\la$)} \label{youngtocharpolyalg} \begin{algorithmic} \State AllMu$ \gets \{\mu \subset \la \ \Big| \ \la - \mu \text{ is a vertical strip}\}$ \State $P^\la \gets 0$ \ForAll{Partitions $\rho$ with $|\rho| \leq |\la|$} \State $F^\la_\rho \gets 0$ \ForAll{$\mu \in \text{AllMu}$ with $|\mu| = |\rho|$} \State $F^\la_\rho \gets F^\la_\rho + (-1)^{|\la| - |\rho|}\text{CharEval}(\mu, \rho)$ \Comment{Algorithm \ref{chareval}} \EndFor \State $P^\la \gets P^\la + F^\la_\rho \binom{X}{\rho}$ \EndFor \State \Return result \end{algorithmic}
